text:
FIX

 

Use latest driver version

http://www.emulex.com/downloads/emulex/drivers/freebsd/freebsd-91-amd64/driv
ers/

 

I put it to 10.0 Release src tree and rebuild system. Now it work without
hangs and panics.

On 9.2 I have compile error.

 

I think then new oce version can go to CURRENT.
